title: PX to REM Converter
seo_description: Convert pixels to rem units instantly. Free online px to rem calculator for CSS.
how_it_works: Divide the pixel value by 16 (the browser default root font size) to get rem. Change your root font-size? Just divide by that value instead.

title: REM to PX Converter
seo_description: Convert rem to pixels instantly. Essential CSS unit converter for web developers.
how_it_works: Multiply the rem value by 16 (the browser default root font size) to get pixels.

title: Unix Timestamp Converter
formula_js: (function() { const ts = parseFloat($('tsInput').value); if (isNaN(ts)) return '—'; const d = new Date(ts * 1000); return { primary: d.toLocaleString('en-GB', { timeZone: 'UTC', dateStyle: 'full', timeStyle: 'medium' }) + ' UTC', sub: 'Local: ' + d.toLocaleString('en-GB', { dateStyle: 'full', timeStyle: 'medium' }) }; })()
seo_description: Convert Unix timestamp to human-readable date and time. Free online epoch converter.
how_it_works: Unix timestamps count seconds since January 1, 1970 (UTC). Enter any timestamp to see both UTC and local time.

title: Percentage Calculator
formula_js: (function() { const pct = parseFloat($('percPct').value); const total = parseFloat($('percOf').value); if (isNaN(pct) || isNaN(total)) return '—'; const result = (pct / 100) * total; return { primary: result.toFixed(2), sub: pct + '% of ' + total + ' = ' + result.toFixed(2) }; })()
seo_description: Calculate percentages instantly. Free online percentage calculator — what is X% of Y?
how_it_works: Enter a percentage and a total. The calculator tells you what X% of Y is. For example, 20% of 200 = 40.

title: Bytes to Kilobytes Converter
seo_description: Convert bytes to kilobytes (KB) instantly. Free file size unit converter.
how_it_works: Divide bytes by 1024 to get kilobytes. 1 KB = 1024 bytes.

title: Kilobytes to Megabytes Converter
seo_description: Convert kilobytes to megabytes instantly. Free file size calculator.
how_it_works: Divide kilobytes by 1024 to get megabytes. 1 MB = 1024 KB.

title: Megabytes to Gigabytes Converter
seo_description: Convert megabytes to gigabytes instantly. Free storage unit calculator.
how_it_works: Divide megabytes by 1024 to get gigabytes. 1 GB = 1024 MB.

title: Celsius to Fahrenheit Converter
seo_description: Convert Celsius to Fahrenheit instantly. Free temperature unit converter.
how_it_works: Multiply by 9/5 then add 32. So 100°C = (100 × 1.8) + 32 = 212°F.

title: Fahrenheit to Celsius Converter
seo_description: Convert Fahrenheit to Celsius instantly. Free temperature calculator.
how_it_works: Subtract 32 then multiply by 5/9. So 212°F = (212 − 32) × 5/9 = 100°C.

title: Kilometres to Miles Converter
seo_description: Convert kilometres to miles instantly. Free distance unit converter.
how_it_works: Multiply kilometres by 0.621371 to get miles. 1 km = 0.621371 miles.

title: Miles to Kilometres Converter
seo_description: Convert miles to kilometres instantly. Free distance calculator.
how_it_works: Multiply miles by 1.60934 to get kilometres. 1 mile = 1.60934 km.

title: Kilograms to Pounds Converter
seo_description: Convert kilograms to pounds instantly. Free weight unit converter.
how_it_works: Multiply kilograms by 2.20462 to get pounds. 1 kg = 2.20462 lbs.

title: Pounds to Kilograms Converter
seo_description: Convert pounds to kilograms instantly. Free weight calculator.
how_it_works: Divide pounds by 2.20462 to get kilograms. 1 lb = 0.453592 kg.

title: GBP to USD Converter
formula_js: (function() { const gbp = parseFloat($('gbpAmount').value); const rate = parseFloat($('gbpRate').value) || 1.27; if (isNaN(gbp)) return '—'; const usd = gbp * rate; return { primary: 'USD $' + usd.toFixed(2), sub: '£' + gbp.toFixed(2) + ' × ' + rate.toFixed(4) + ' = $' + usd.toFixed(2) }; })()
seo_description: Convert British pounds to US dollars. Free GBP to USD currency converter with adjustable rate.
how_it_works: Multiplies the GBP amount by the exchange rate. Default rate is 1.27. Adjust the rate field for live rates from your bank or broker.

title: Hexadecimal to Decimal Converter
seo_description: Convert hexadecimal to decimal instantly. Free hex to dec calculator for developers.
how_it_works: Hexadecimal (base 16) uses digits 0-9 and letters A-F. parseInt converts it to base 10.

title: Centimetres to Inches Converter
seo_description: Convert centimetres to inches instantly. Free length unit converter.
how_it_works: Divide centimetres by 2.54 to get inches. 1 inch = 2.54 cm exactly.

title: Inches to Centimetres Converter
seo_description: Convert inches to centimetres instantly. Free length calculator.
how_it_works: Multiply inches by 2.54 to get centimetres. 1 inch = 2.54 cm exactly.

title: VW to PX Converter
formula_js: (function() { const vw = parseFloat($('vwInput').value); const vp = parseFloat($('vpInput').value) || 1440; if (isNaN(vw)) return '—'; return { primary: (vw / 100 * vp).toFixed(2) + ' px', sub: vw + 'vw at ' + vp + 'px viewport' }; })()
seo_description: Convert CSS vw units to pixels. Enter your viewport width for accurate results.
how_it_works: 1vw = 1% of the viewport width. Adjust the viewport field to match your target screen size.

title: BMI Calculator
formula_js: (function() { const weight = parseFloat($('bmiWeight').value); const heightCm = parseFloat($('bmiHeight').value); if (isNaN(weight) || isNaN(heightCm) || weight <= 0 || heightCm <= 0) return '—'; const heightM = heightCm / 100; const bmi = weight / (heightM * heightM); let cat = ''; let col = ''; if (bmi < 18.5) { cat = 'Underweight'; col = '#dbeafe'; } else if (bmi < 25) { cat = 'Normal weight'; col = '#4ade80'; } else if (bmi < 30) { cat = 'Overweight'; col = '#fbbf24'; } else { cat = 'Obese'; col = '#ef4444'; } return { primary: bmi.toFixed(1) + ' kg/m²', sub: 'Category: ' + cat }; })()
seo_description: Calculate your Body Mass Index (BMI). Free online BMI calculator using metric units.
how_it_works: BMI = weight (kg) ÷ height² (m²). A BMI of 18.5–24.9 is considered healthy for adults.

title: Minutes to Hours Converter
seo_description: Convert minutes to hours instantly. Free time unit calculator.
how_it_works: Divide minutes by 60 to get hours. For example, 90 minutes = 1.5 hours.
